channel.title: Worp Agent
channel.description: Worp Term Mac agent + menubar app updates

item.title: v1.0.635
item.description:
What's new

  • First public release — Worp
  • iPhone ↔ Mac wormhole: tmux session attach over peer-to-peer WebRTC
  • Sign in with Apple for cross-device pairing
  • Seamless migration from legacy installs (pairing and sessions retained)

Build 1.0.635 · macOS 14+ · .dmg 41 MB

item.title: v1.0.672
item.description:
What is new in this update

  • scripts: release-mac.sh notarytool profile BC-safe fallback (CD-A1 rebrand cohesive)
  • agent: MM Phase 2 Commit 3 — wire integration test (server Option A cohesive 126)
  • server: MM Phase 2 Option A — role=mac-initiator (cohesive 126)
  • mac + agent: MM Phase 2 Commit 4 — UI hook + agent connect subcommand
  • agent: MM Phase 2 scaffolding — Mac-to-Mac initiator code path (Option A)
  • ios: cohesive 124 — QR scan 후 ConnectionModel 자동 switch (multi-Mac Path C transfer root fix)
  • ios: HIGH PRIORITY — Path C single-Mac assumption fix (auto-trigger every pairing .live, Mac team H1 ROOT)
  • mac + agent: MM Phase 1 — SessionsManagerView Other Macs (account-linked) read-only section
  • No changes

Build v1.0.672 · 2026-05-16 06:35 UTC · .dmg 41M / .zip 38M

item.title: v1.0.674
item.description:

  • ios: HIGH PRIORITY — Path C single-Mac assumption fix (auto-trigger every pairing .live, Mac team H1 ROOT)
  • No changes

item.title: v1.0.676
item.description:
What is new in this update

  • mac: CRITICAL fix — d10e15b mass-rename collision (cohesive 130, sign-in lost root)
  • agent + mac: MM Option D — iOS-active guard (cohesive 127, 사용자 invariant #1 preserve)
  • agent + mac: MM Phase 5 fix — agent connect signaling URL fallback (v2-only paired Mac)

Build v1.0.676 · 2026-05-16 13:06 UTC · .dmg 41M / .zip 39M

item.title: v1.0.678
item.description:
What is new in this update

  • mac: brand identity — AppIcon (Dock/Finder/Launchpad) + menubar icon (cohesive 130 parallel)
  • ios: cohesive 130 iOS 18+ AppIcon variants — Light + Dark + Tinted slots (chief direct sub-cycle)
  • mac: CRITICAL fix — d10e15b mass-rename collision (cohesive 130, sign-in lost root)
  • agent + mac: MM Option D — iOS-active guard (cohesive 127, 사용자 invariant #1 preserve)
  • agent + mac: MM Phase 5 fix — agent connect signaling URL fallback (v2-only paired Mac)
  • scripts: release-mac.sh notarytool profile BC-safe fallback (CD-A1 rebrand cohesive)
  • agent: MM Phase 2 Commit 3 — wire integration test (server Option A cohesive 126)
  • server: MM Phase 2 Option A — role=mac-initiator (cohesive 126)
  • No changes

Build v1.0.678 · 2026-05-16 13:21 UTC · .dmg 41M / .zip 38M

item.title: v1.0.680
item.description:
What is new in this update

  • architect: Phase 4 Option A spec — 결정 항목 5 (PTY relay architecture) 추가
  • mac: 사용자 explicit feedback — menubar icon iOS AppIcon cohesive (wormhole spiral)
  • architect: Phase 4 Option A multi-peer spec design + 사용자 결정 prerequisite (cohesive 131)
  • mac: brand identity — AppIcon (Dock/Finder/Launchpad) + menubar icon (cohesive 130 parallel)
  • ios: cohesive 130 iOS 18+ AppIcon variants — Light + Dark + Tinted slots (chief direct sub-cycle)
  • mac: CRITICAL fix — d10e15b mass-rename collision (cohesive 130, sign-in lost root)
  • agent + mac: MM Option D — iOS-active guard (cohesive 127, 사용자 invariant #1 preserve)
  • agent + mac: MM Phase 5 fix — agent connect signaling URL fallback (v2-only paired Mac)
  • No changes

Build v1.0.680 · 2026-05-16 13:53 UTC · .dmg 41M / .zip 38M

item.title: v1.0.686
item.description:
What is new in this update

  • ios: Phase 4 Stage 3 Foundation — MacPubkey model + AccountAPI.getMacPubkeys (cohesive 131+132 Sub-option 5.C)
  • mac: Foundation cohesive 131 XML fix — comment double-hyphen sequence 회피
  • mac: Foundation cohesive 131 build fix — entitlements XML hardcoded prefix + xcodebuild ad-hoc
  • server: MM Phase 4 Stage 1 — peerRoom dynamic map + peerKey wire + account-mediated trust (cohesive 131)
  • mac + agent: SR+SG+SD Foundation cohesive 131 — Keychain-access-groups (사용자 결정 B1)
  • architect: Phase 4 Option A spec — 사용자 결정 5.C Account-mediated direct P2P cohesive
  • architect: Phase 4 Option A spec — 결정 항목 5 (PTY relay architecture) 추가
  • mac: 사용자 explicit feedback — menubar icon iOS AppIcon cohesive (wormhole spiral)
  • No changes

Build v1.0.686 · 2026-05-16 14:24 UTC · .dmg 41M / .zip 38M

item.title: v1.0.732
item.description:
What is new in this update

  • architect: SG V2 spec — V2-B1 chief direct ship + 4 layer cohesive align verified (cohesive 143)
  • architect: SG V2 spec — schema drift Option C resolution complete (cohesive 143)
  • ios: V2-I1 schema drift fix — broker_sessions + 3 error reasons (cohesive 143)
  • architect: V2 schema drift Option C — proto .reply → .result + spec update (cohesive 142)
  • mac: V2-Mac1 hot fix — group.team_activate.reply → .result (cohesive 142)
  • architect: V2 cohesive 142 — proto group.team_activate + SG spec V2-I1 done + invariant scope clarity 3 instance baseline
  • mac: V2-Mac1 broker REST client + DC group.team_activate (cohesive 142)
  • ios: V2-I1 team activation — '+ 팀 활성화' menu + DC bridge + mock harness (cohesive 142)
  • No changes

Build v1.0.732 · 2026-05-21 14:06 UTC · .dmg 43M / .zip 39M
